description: each accepted job runs for exactly hours_required contiguous hours
each accepted job uses exactly gpus_required GPUs
GPU memory >= job min_gpu_memory_gb
a GPU runs at most one job at a time
gang scheduling - all GPUs of a multi-GPU job share the same start hour
multi-GPU jobs stay on a single node unless InfiniBand is used

per-node power budget not exceeded at any time
cooling zone A supports at most 24 active GPUs at full power simultaneously
license seats not exceeded (CUDA-advanced / NCCL-pro)
team max_gpus_at_once not exceeded at any hour
team total gpu-hours <= max_concurrent_gpu_hours weekly budget
team allowed_nodes whitelist respected
job completion time <= deadline_hour
no job runs on a node during that node's maintenance window
dataset locality - if dataset_cached_node is set the job runs there
tier-1 (T1) team receives >= 70% of its demanded gpu-hours
non-preemptable jobs are not interrupted (always contiguous by HC1)
min run duration 1h (no sub-hour scheduling)
V100 cannot run jobs requiring > 16GB memory
infrastructure team T6 must schedule all of its jobs
pretrain jobs must run on H100 or A100-80GB (not A100-40GB or V100)
maximize total accepted jobs
prefer higher-tier teams (T1 > T2 > T3 > T4 > T5)
minimize total power consumption
maximize H100 utilization for pretrain jobs
balance load across teams (fairness)
meet deadlines with slack
minimize cross cooling zone usage
prefer completion within first 5 days
